con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="PredictiveModelWCCService" targetNamespace="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:wsa="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing" xmlns:wsap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing/policy" xmlns:wsa10="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing" xmlns:wsaw="http://www.w3.org/2006/05/addressing/wsdl" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata" xmlns:wsx="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/mex" xmlns:msc="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/12/wsdl/contract" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:tns="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="CalculateFactor"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="request" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:complexContent mixed="false"> <xs:extension base="tns:BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimCreatedDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimantGender" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DateOfBirth" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DateReported" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DetailedBodyParts" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfBodyPartDetails"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DetailedCauseOfInjury" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DetailedNatureOfInjury" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EmployerName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="HowReported" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredAddress1" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredAddress2" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredAddress3" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredCity" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredClaimantClassCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredFirstName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredLastName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredStateCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredSuffixName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredZip" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LossDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="OriginalEffectiveDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyState" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="StateOfJurisdiction" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TotalIncurredAmount" type="xs:decimal"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimType" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CorelationId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RatingModelName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfBodyPartDetails"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="BodyPartDetails" nillable="true" type="tns:BodyPartDetails"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfBodyPartDetails" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfBodyPartDetails"/> <xs:complexType name="BodyPartDetails"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DetailedBodyPart" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PrimaryBodyPartIndicator" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SequenceBodyPart" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="BodyPartDetails" nillable="true" type="tns:BodyPartDetails"/> <xs:element name="CalculateFactorResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CalculateFactorResult" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse"> <xs:complexContent mixed="false"> <xs:extension base="tns:BaseResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CorelationId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ModelID" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ResponseDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Score" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SubModleID" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="BaseResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Error" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfErrorDetail"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="BaseResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:BaseResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfErrorDetail"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="ErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorDetail"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfErrorDetail"/> <xs:complexType name="ErrorDetail"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Error" type="tns:ErrorType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ErrorInfo" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorDetail"/> <xs:simpleType name="ErrorType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="None"/> <xs:enumeration value="Validation"/> <xs:enumeration value="ServiceError"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="ErrorType" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorType"/> </xs:schema> <xs:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="anyType" nillable="true" type="xs:anyType"/> <xs:element name="anyURI" nillable="true" type="xs:anyURI"/> <xs:element name="base64Binary" nillable="true" type="xs:base64Binary"/> <xs:element name="boolean" nillable="true" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="byte" nillable="true" type="xs:byte"/> <xs:element name="dateTime" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element name="decimal" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element name="double" nillable="true" type="xs:double"/> <xs:element name="float" nillable="true" type="xs:float"/> <xs:element name="int" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="long" nillable="true" type="xs:long"/> <xs:element name="QName" nillable="true" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:element name="short" nillable="true" type="xs:short"/> <xs:element name="string" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="unsignedByte" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedByte"/> <xs:element name="unsignedInt" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedInt"/> <xs:element name="unsignedLong" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedLong"/> <xs:element name="unsignedShort" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedShort"/> <xs:element name="char" nillable="true" type="tns:char"/> <xs:simpleType name="char"> <xs:restriction base="xs:int"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="duration" nillable="true" type="tns:duration"/> <xs:simpleType name="duration"> <xs:restriction base="xs:duration"> <xs:pattern value="\-?P(\d*D)?(T(\d*H)?(\d*M)?(\d*(\.\d*)?S)?)?"/> <xs:minInclusive value="-P10675199DT2H48M5.4775808S"/> <xs:maxInclusive value="P10675199DT2H48M5.4775807S"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="guid" nillable="true" type="tns:guid"/> <xs:simpleType name="guid"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[\da-fA-F]{8}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{12}"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:attribute name="FactoryType" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:attribute name="Id" type="xs:ID"/> <xs:attribute name="Ref" type="xs:IDREF"/> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="IWCCPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:CalculateFactor"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IWCCPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:CalculateFactorResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="IWCCPredictiveModelService"> <wsdl:operation name="CalculateFactor"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities/IWCCPredictiveModelService/CalculateFactor" message="tns:IWCCPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities/IWCCPredictiveModelService/CalculateFactorResponse" message="tns:IWCCPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="BasicHttpBinding_IWCCPredictiveModelService" type="tns:IWCCPredictiveModelService"> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="CalculateFactor"> <soap:operation soapAction="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities/IWCCPredictiveModelService/CalculateFactor" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="PredictiveModelWCCService"> <wsdl:port name="BasicHttpBinding_IWCCPredictiveModelService" binding="tns:BasicHttpBinding_IWCCPredictiveModelService"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:8080/PREDICTIVEMODELWCC/PredictiveModelWCC"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request:
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:wcc="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities"> <soapenv:Header/> <soapenv:Body>
<tns:CalculateFactor xmlns:tns="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities"> <tns:request> <tns:ClaimNumber>W2023-035497</tns:ClaimNumber> <tns:ClaimType>TL</tns:ClaimType> <tns:CorelationId>1a3d808b-4d41-467e-8472-3519b0480992</tns:CorelationId> <tns:PolicyNumber>1011460</tns:PolicyNumber> <tns:ClaimCreatedDate>2023-07-11T10:51:28.903-04:00</tns:ClaimCreatedDate> <tns:ClaimID>1503411</tns:ClaimID> <tns:ClaimantGender>Female</tns:ClaimantGender> <tns:DateOfBirth>1987-05-22T00:00:00-04:00</tns:DateOfBirth> <tns:DateReported>2023-07-11T10:51:28.653-04:00</tns:DateReported> <tns:DetailedBodyParts> <tns:BodyPartDetails> <tns:DetailedBodyPart>Shoulder(s)</tns:DetailedBodyPart> <tns:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator>Yes</tns:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator> <tns:SequenceBodyPart>200</tns:SequenceBodyPart> </tns:BodyPartDetails> <tns:BodyPartDetails> <tns:DetailedBodyPart>Facial bones</tns:DetailedBodyPart> <tns:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator>No</tns:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator> <tns:SequenceBodyPart>300</tns:SequenceBodyPart> </tns:BodyPartDetails> </tns:DetailedBodyParts> <tns:DetailedCauseOfInjury>Struck or injured by fellow worker; patient</tns:DetailedCauseOfInjury> <tns:DetailedNatureOfInjury>Contusion</tns:DetailedNatureOfInjury> <tns:EmployerName>Visiting Homemakers Service of Passaic County</tns:EmployerName> <tns:HowReported>Phone</tns:HowReported> <tns:InjuredAddress1>37 Pierce St</tns:InjuredAddress1> <tns:InjuredCity>Newark</tns:InjuredCity> <tns:InjuredClaimantClassCode>88280 - Homemaker Service</tns:InjuredClaimantClassCode> <tns:InjuredFirstName>Dunyagozel</tns:InjuredFirstName> <tns:InjuredLastName>Sayidova</tns:InjuredLastName> <tns:InjuredStateCode>NJ</tns:InjuredStateCode> <tns:InjuredZip>07103</tns:InjuredZip> <tns:LossDate>2023-06-29T21:00:00-04:00</tns:LossDate> <tns:OriginalEffectiveDate>2023-05-26T00:00:00-04:00</tns:OriginalEffectiveDate> <tns:PolicyState>NJ</tns:PolicyState> <tns:StateOfJurisdiction>NJ</tns:StateOfJurisdiction> <tns:TotalIncurredAmount>13698</tns:TotalIncurredAmount> </tns:request> </tns:CalculateFactor> </soapenv:Body> </soapenv:Envelope>

con:call.name: UAT
con:call.con:request:
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:wcc="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities"> <soapenv:Header/> <soapenv:Body>
<tns:CalculateFactor xmlns:tns="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities"> <tns:request> <tns:ClaimNumber>W2023-035310</tns:ClaimNumber> <tns:ClaimType>TL</tns:ClaimType> <tns:CorelationId>2e7cb3d3-4162-4d6e-b274-1f1c6f0f5510</tns:CorelationId> <tns:PolicyNumber>W371468</tns:PolicyNumber> <tns:ClaimCreatedDate>2023-07-06T00:58:34-04:00</tns:ClaimCreatedDate> <tns:ClaimID>1727425295</tns:ClaimID> <tns:ClaimantGender>Male</tns:ClaimantGender> <tns:DateOfBirth>1967-05-23T00:01:01-04:00</tns:DateOfBirth> <tns:DateReported>2023-07-06T08:58:01.822-04:00</tns:DateReported> <tns:DetailedBodyParts> <tns:BodyPartDetails> <tns:DetailedBodyPart>Soft tissue (head)</tns:DetailedBodyPart> <tns:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator>Yes</tns:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator> <tns:SequenceBodyPart>100</tns:SequenceBodyPart> </tns:BodyPartDetails> </tns:DetailedBodyParts> <tns:DetailedCauseOfInjury>Miscellaneous - other</tns:DetailedCauseOfInjury> <tns:DetailedNatureOfInjury>Other specific injury</tns:DetailedNatureOfInjury> <tns:EmployerName>D &C Electrical Contractors Inc</tns:EmployerName> <tns:HowReported>Web</tns:HowReported> <tns:InjuredAddress1>78 Lewis Street</tns:InjuredAddress1> <tns:InjuredCity>Phillipsburg</tns:InjuredCity> <tns:InjuredClaimantClassCode>06611 - Electrical Wiring</tns:InjuredClaimantClassCode> <tns:InjuredFirstName>Charlie</tns:InjuredFirstName> <tns:InjuredLastName>Liberti</tns:InjuredLastName> <tns:InjuredStateCode>NJ</tns:InjuredStateCode> <tns:InjuredZip>08865</tns:InjuredZip> <tns:LossDate>2023-07-05T00:01:01-04:00</tns:LossDate> <tns:OriginalEffectiveDate>2005-03-21T00:00:00-05:00</tns:OriginalEffectiveDate> <tns:PolicyState>PA</tns:PolicyState> <tns:StateOfJurisdiction>PA</tns:StateOfJurisdiction> <tns:TotalIncurredAmount>13698</tns:TotalIncurredAmount> </tns:request> </tns:CalculateFactor> </soapenv:Body> </soapenv:Envelope>
